title: Translate vetted childhood vaccination schedule guidance into Spanish
context: Community health workers need vetted childhood vaccination schedule guidance in Spanish. Use a vetted public-health source (e.g. WHO/MoH); verify the source licence permits translation/derivatives and record it — do NOT assume CC-BY. Include the required source attribution and any mandated translation disclaimer.
objective: Produce an accurate Spanish translation of vetted childhood vaccination schedule guidance, preserving medical terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed by a qualified Spanish-speaking reviewer (risk-tier: medium)
Source licence verified to permit translation + attribution/disclaimer recorded (not relicensed as CC-BY unless the source allows)
